archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) combined with iOS 26 Liquid Glass
design_philosophy: A sophisticated, Apple-inspired 'Liquid Glass' aesthetic that turns a traditionally aggressive cybersecurity scanner into a calm, premium, and highly analytical command center. Uses deep obsidian backgrounds, heavy backdrop blurs, and vibrant pastel data visualizations to create depth without clutter. Purely optical and emotional.

rules: No generic sans (Inter/Roboto) for headings. Use 'Outfit' for that sleek, modern iOS feel.
Headings (H1/H2): Must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter to look premium.
Data metrics (large numbers): Use Outfit with font-light or font-black to create tension, e.g., text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter.
Never center-align left-to-right reading content. Left-align data and forms for optical clarity.

background.mesh_gradient: Radial gradients (pastel blue, cyan, mint) layered behind the background with extreme blur to simulate light bleeding into the dark room.

brand_accents.note: Avoid pure teal (#1B93A4) entirely. Rely on Cyan and Mint for the requested aesthetic.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, calculated spacing. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6.
spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: gap-6 for main panels, gap-2 for dense internal widgets (like the tool grid).
spacing_and_layout.panel_spacing: All glass cards must have p-6 or p-8 internal padding to prevent content from touching the luminous borders.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Use rounded-3xl for main layout containers (iOS 26 aesthetic) and rounded-xl for inner elements.
spacing_and_layout.optical_alignment: Ensure icons inside buttons have right-padding of 4px instead of 6px to optically center the text.

motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer Motion Spring animations. type: 'spring', stiffness: 300, damping: 30.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards must elevate slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase the border-white/10 to border-white/20 on hover. The inner backdrop-blur should feel deeper.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Inputs and buttons must have a glowing focus ring (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500/50).
motion_and_interactions.progress_pulse: Running tools should have an infinite soft pulse animation on their background or border.

scan_form.style: Crystal Glass panel. Input fields should be bg-black/40 with border-white/10, text-white. Focus state activates a cyan glow.
scan_form.tor_toggle: iOS style pill toggle, turns mint green when active, subtle inner shadow.

progress_bar.style: Liquid gradient bar. bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 via-cyan-400 to-mint-400.
progress_bar.effects: Add a drop-shadow matching the gradient color (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,211,238,0.5)]) to make it look like a neon light tube.
progress_bar.typography: Phase indicator in JetBrains Mono above the bar, tracking wider.

tool_grid.layout: Grid of 150 items. grid-cols-5 md:grid-cols-10 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-2.
tool_grid.item_style: Tiny bento cells. rounded-md p-2 text-xs font-mono border text-center transition-all duration-300.
tool_grid.status_colors: Queued (gray/muted), Running (blue/cyan with pulse animation), Done (mint green), Failed (rose red).

findings_dashboard.layout: Bento box row with 4-5 columns for severities.
findings_dashboard.card_style: Glass surface. Huge metrics (text-5xl font-light tracking-tighter).

server_info_panel.style: Terminal-lite aesthetic embedded in a glass card. font-mono, text-sm, text-white/70. Dot indicator (green) for active status.
server_info_panel.layout: Top-right corner widget or sidebar block.

results_view.style: Detailed, highly readable pane. Left side: list of findings. Right side: Evidence & Remediation.
results_view.typography: High contrast for CVE links (pastel blue + hover:underline). Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout, Shadcn for accordions/tabs.

assets.notes: No external images required. The aesthetic relies entirely on CSS backdrop-filters, mesh gradients, and typography.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over glass panels meets WCAG AA 4.5:1. Use text-white/90 for primary readable text, not white/50.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: ALL interactive elements (buttons, toggles, form inputs, tool grid cells) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the defined 'glass_heavy' and 'glass_light' Tailwind classes for the card UI to achieve the iOS 26 Liquid Glass look.
Set a global background mesh using fixed absolutely positioned blurred divs:
For the tool grid, since there are 150 items, heavily optimize rendering. Use raw div grids rather than heavy React components for each cell.
Implement the 'tor_toggle' using Shadcn Switch, but override the thumb to look more like the iOS design (pure white thumb, cyan active track).
Use Framer Motion to stagger the entrance of the dashboard cards.
Use Phosphor icons (e.g., Shield, Radar, Globe) to compliment the high-end UI.
Ensure the progress bar has a smooth width transition via inline styles and CSS transitions to reflect real-time WebSocket updates.

Remember to inject Google Fonts in index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>
For charts (if used for severity breakdown), use Recharts with a transparent background and custom Tooltip that mimics the glass styling.
